title: DRIVE AWAY HUNGER - 211info
text: DRIVE AWAY HUNGER DRIVE AWAY HUNGER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of automobiles, recreational vehicles, boats, motorcycles, medium to heavy trucks, buses, and fleet vehicles. Vehicle donations are tax-deductible, and proceeds go towards programs within Portland Rescue Mission. 8301 NE Jonesmore Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Sales Lot Hours: Tuesday-Friday noon-5pm Email (503) 906-7673 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 906-7673 Main phone Main phone (503) 906-7673 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to fill out form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Title and identification card in order to show proof of ownership AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Vehicle Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DRIVE AWAY HUNGER
